title: conioselinum pteridophyllum
intro: Conioselinum pteridophyllum, also known as Japanese angelica or angelica keiskei, is a type of plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Conioselinum pteridophyllum include reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
